trait.name: Blazing Blade
trait.effect:
Once a round, you may attempt one of the following, rolling a d6 and attempting to roll equal to or under the round number, and gaining the following on success:
• Blade cleave you hit an attack, cut deeply into your target's soul, forcing them to sacrifice 4 HP.
• Blade parry you are damaged, gain 4 vitality before being damaged.
If you are bloodied, roll 2d6 and pick the lowest. If you are in crisis, roll 3d6 and pick the lowest instead.

basicAttack.name: Magi
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6
Area effect: 2 damage
Effect a difficult (5+) dangerous terrain space in the center space, even if it's occupied.

limitBreak.name: Transmigration of Fire
limitBreak.effect:
O Flame, I command thee,
Make a pyre of our souls,
And a crucible of our sin,
Great Transmigration!
Effect yourself and a willing ally in range, or two willing allies in range. Exchange the hp totals of each character. Any bloodied character after the swap gains 3 vigor. Any character in crisis gains 3d3 vigor instead, or 3d6 if they're at 1 hp.

keywords.name: Sacrifice X
keywords.description: Spend X hp directly as part of this ability, which cannot be ignored or reduced. Sacrificing cannot reduce you past 1 hp, and you can sacrifice even if the cost is higher than your current hp.
